nodes.description: Turn the admitted raw policy question into a bounded, epistemically neutral problem-brief proposal.
nodes.title: Draft problem brief

nodes.description: A human approves one exact problem-brief candidate hash before any research node may start.
nodes.title: Approve problem brief

nodes.description: Research the approved problem through one admitted lens and produce sourced atomic evidence artifacts.
nodes.title: Research: hungarian education system

nodes.description: Research the approved problem through one admitted lens and produce sourced atomic evidence artifacts.
nodes.title: Research: international comparison

nodes.title: Research: legal and governance

nodes.description: Research the approved problem through one admitted lens and produce sourced atomic evidence artifacts.
nodes.title: Research: political feasibility

nodes.description: Research the approved problem through one admitted lens and produce sourced atomic evidence artifacts.
nodes.title: Research: implementation planning

nodes.description: Turn atomic findings into bounded canonical claims and explicit evidence conflicts, with an exact disposition for every finding.
nodes.title: Normalize evidence

nodes.description: Derive possible change levers from normalized claims and conflicts without yet clustering them into policy directions.
nodes.title: Derive option seeds

nodes.description: Cluster the complete option-seed set into candidate directions and record an exact disposition for every seed before human approval.
nodes.title: Cluster option seeds

nodes.description: A human approves one exact candidate hash or returns it for a new derivation. The gate never edits generated content in place.
nodes.title: Approve option space

nodes.description: Build concrete proposals from fresh evidence and one exact human-approved option-space artifact.
nodes.title: Derive transformations

nodes.description: Assess every transformation through one admitted lens using only the proposal and that lens's evidence artifacts.
nodes.title: Assess: hungarian education system

nodes.description: Assess every transformation through one admitted lens using only the proposal and that lens's evidence artifacts.
nodes.title: Assess: international comparison

nodes.title: Assess: implementation planning

nodes.description: Separate evidence-resolvable disputes from residual value conflicts.
nodes.title: Identify decision dilemmas

nodes.description: Turn decision-critical uncertainties into concrete research questions.
nodes.title: Build research agenda

nodes.description: Assemble a public decision package from exact upstream artifacts.
nodes.title: Assemble decision package

nodes.description: Cross-family evaluation of the visible decision package and its graph.
nodes.title: Evaluate decision package

nodes.description: Apply the deterministic external-use and readiness gate.
nodes.title: Assess decision readiness
